description: Fix Susanoo VP preview missing Fukurokuju fortress count in advanceKamiResolution and advancePlayer
steps: Step 1 - Fix advanceKamiResolution (~line 1863): Update the fortress count filter to include Fukurokuju monsters by adding `|| (f.type === 'monster' && f.monsterCardId === 'sp-fukurokuju')` to the filter condition.

Step 2 - Fix advancePlayer (~line 3602): Update the fortress count filter to include Fukurokuju monsters by adding `|| (f.type === 'monster' && f.monsterCardId === 'sp-fukurokuju')` to the filter condition.
acceptance_criteria: Both Susanoo VP preview computations include Fukurokuju as a fortress
The filter condition matches the pattern used in resolveCurrentKamiReward
findings: Both locations fixed to match the correct pattern used elsewhere in the codebase. Build passes.
